goals.title: Architecture Modularization
goals.objective: Split the single-file MVP into repo-native modules while preserving current behavior and adding tests for existing collector/classifier/learner/routerqosd paths.

goals.title: Core Domain Model
goals.objective: Introduce Signal, Profile, PolicyAction, Receipt, Rollback, Backend trait, built-in pack schema, and local runtime file boundaries.

goals.title: Autopilot Decisions
goals.objective: Implement built-in autopilot packs, confidence scoring, profile selection, user feedback learning, and PETSCII CLI status/explain outputs in dry-run form.

goals.title: Local And Router Backends
goals.objective: Implement DSCP-first local backend with inspect/apply/status/remove/explain, adapt routerqosd to the Backend trait, and add disabled WinDivert lab stub.

goals.title: Daemon Safety Loop
goals.objective: Add always-on autopilot loop, boot/install planning surface, pause/resume/status controls, fail-closed mutation handling, receipts, and rollback behavior.

goals.title: Network Lab And Optimizer
goals.objective: Add lab baseline/run/report commands plus validation-gated policy optimizer that keeps better policies and rolls back worse candidates.

goals.title: Final Quality Gate
goals.objective: Run ai-slop-cleaner, full verification, code review, fix blockers, update docs, and only then mark the ultragoal complete.

claudeObjective: Complete all ultragoal stories in .omc/ultragoal/goals.json: G001-architecture-modularization Architecture Modularization; G002-core-domain-model Core Domain Model; G003-autopilot-decisions Autopilot Decisions; G004-local-and-router-backends Local And Router Backends; G005-daemon-safety-loop Daemon Safety Loop; G006-network-lab-and-optimizer Network Lab And Optimizer; G007-final-quality-gate Final Quality Gate
